g.text: Async: POST /webhook → queued, poll for response
Routes to framework: LangChain | LangGraph | CrewAI | PydanticAI | Custom
Request ────→ HTTP 402 ────→ Auto-pay USDC ────→ Retry with proof
EthAccountSigner wallet derived from agent seed
How Agent A calls Agent B
① Agent A ─── GET /agents?keyword=weather ──────────────────────────→ Registry returns webhook URLs + DID
② Agent A ─── POST /webhook/sync { AgentMessage } ──────────────────→ Agent B's Flask server receives + routes to handler
③ If price set: Agent B returns HTTP 402 → Agent A auto-pays USDC → Retries with X-PAYMENT proof → Agent B returns 200
